title: Clients

deleteConfirm.title: Delete client

documents.title: Documents

documents.formats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV — 20 MB max.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete document

documents.caption: Label (optional)

gdpr.consentHint: Tick if the client consented to the processing of their personal data.

anonymizeConfirm.title: Anonymize client
anonymizeConfirm.message: This permanently neutralizes personal data (name, email, phone, address, permit) and deletes documents. Past reservations are kept but anonymized. Irreversible.

readOnlyNotice: Read-only: the CRM module is inactive. Your existing clients stay visible; adding and editing are disabled.
